test_cases.test_case: Login with valid teacher credentials
preconditions: Test site is reachable
Teacher account exists with known username and password
steps: 1. Navigate to the login page
2. Enter valid Username
3. Enter valid Password
4. Click the 'Log in' button
test_cases.expected_result: Teacher is authenticated and redirected to the Dashboard showing personalized greeting and Dashboard blocks

test_cases.test_case: Login with invalid credentials shows error
preconditions: Test site is reachable
steps: 1. Navigate to the login page
2. Enter an invalid Username or Password
3. Click the 'Log in' button
test_cases.expected_result: Inline error message is displayed, password field is cleared, username remains populated for correction, and user stays on login page

test_cases.test_case: Login attempt with empty password field
preconditions: Test site is reachable
Username field available
steps: 1. Navigate to the login page
2. Enter a valid Username
3. Leave Password field empty
4. Click the 'Log in' button
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error shown for missing password, user remains on login page, password field empty and username retained

test_cases.test_case: Top navigation links navigate to correct pages
preconditions: User is logged in as teacher
steps: 1. From any page, click 'MoodleTest' site name
2. Click 'Home' link
3. Click 'Dashboard' link
4. Click 'My Courses' link
test_cases.expected_result: Each link navigates to its corresponding page (home, dashboard, my courses) without errors

test_cases.test_case: Notifications and messaging icons open appropriate panels
preconditions: User is logged in
steps: 1. Click the notifications bell icon in the top navigation
2. Observe alerts panel
3. Click the messaging icon in the top navigation
test_cases.expected_result: Alerts panel opens displaying notifications; messaging drawer opens showing messages or messaging UI

test_cases.test_case: User menu dropdown shows links and logout ends session
preconditions: User is logged in
steps: 1. Click the user's initials circular icon in the top navigation
2. Verify dropdown contains Profile, Grades, Calendar, Private Files, Reports, Preferences, and Log out
3. Click 'Log out'
test_cases.expected_result: Dropdown shows the listed links; clicking 'Log out' terminates session and redirects to login page

test_cases.test_case: Dashboard displays greeting and Timeline and Calendar blocks
preconditions: User is logged in and has dashboard access
steps: 1. Navigate to Dashboard
2. Verify personalized greeting at top
3. Verify Timeline block and Calendar block are visible side by side
test_cases.expected_result: Greeting is visible; Timeline block shows filters and search, Calendar block shows month view with current month/year and navigation arrows

test_cases.test_case: Timeline block filters and search function
preconditions: User is on Dashboard with timeline items available
steps: 1. In Timeline block select a time range from dropdown
2. Change sort order using sort dropdown
3. Enter a known activity name into Timeline search and submit
test_cases.expected_result: Timeline updates to show items within selected range and sort; search returns matching activities or shows empty state if none

test_cases.test_case: Create new calendar event from Dashboard
preconditions: User is logged in and has permission to add calendar events
steps: 1. From Dashboard's Calendar block click 'New event' button
2. Fill required event fields (title, date/time) in the event form
3. Save the event
test_cases.expected_result: Event is created, appears on the calendar on the correct date, and date displays event name inline

test_cases.test_case: Toggle Dashboard Edit mode and add a block
preconditions: User is logged in
User has permission to edit Dashboard
steps: 1. Toggle Edit mode on the Dashboard
2. Click '+ Add a block' below the Dashboard heading
3. From the Add a block page select 'Text' block and click add
4. Cancel or finish as prompted
test_cases.expected_result: Add a block page lists block types; selecting 'Text' adds it to the dashboard layout and block shows move icon and options menu

test_cases.test_case: Reset Dashboard page to default restores layout
preconditions: User is logged in and has modified Dashboard layout
Edit mode is enabled
steps: 1. In Edit mode click 'Reset page to default' button
2. Confirm reset when prompted
test_cases.expected_result: Dashboard layout is reverted to default configuration for the user

test_cases.test_case: My Courses page shows course cards and star/remove actions
preconditions: User is logged in and enrolled in multiple courses
steps: 1. Navigate to 'My Courses' page
2. Use status dropdown to filter (e.g., All)
3. Click three-dot menu on a course card and select 'Star this course'
4. Click three-dot menu and select 'Remove from view' on another card
test_cases.expected_result: Course cards display banner, name link, category; starring pins the course to top; removing hides the course card from view

test_cases.test_case: Course page collapsible sections and 'Collapse all' functionality
preconditions: User is on a course page with multiple sections
steps: 1. Observe multiple collapsible sections with chevrons
2. Click a section chevron to collapse it
3. Click 'Collapse all' link at top right
test_cases.expected_result: Individual sections collapse on chevron click; 'Collapse all' collapses all sections at once

test_cases.test_case: Enable Course Edit mode and open Activity Chooser
preconditions: User is logged in with teacher editing rights
User is on the Course page
steps: 1. Toggle Edit mode on the Course page
2. Click '+ Add an activity or resource' at the bottom of a section
test_cases.expected_result: Activity Chooser modal opens showing category filter bar, search field, and grid of activity/resource tiles

test_cases.test_case: Use Activity Chooser search/filter and add Assignment
preconditions: Activity Chooser is open
steps: 1. In Activity Chooser, select 'Activities' or 'Recommended' filter
2. Enter 'Assignment' in the search field to locate the Assignment tile
3. Select Assignment tile and click 'Add'
test_cases.expected_result: Assignment creation form opens after selecting 'Add'

test_cases.test_case: Assignment creation fails when required name is missing
preconditions: Assignment creation form is open
steps: 1. Leave Assignment name field empty
2. Configure other optional fields as needed
3. Click 'Save and return to course'
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation highlights Assignment name as required and prevents saving until filled

test_cases.test_case: Enable file submissions with maximum files and size limits
preconditions: Assignment creation form is open
steps: 1. Enter valid Assignment name
2. In Submission types enable File submissions
3. Set maximum number of uploaded files to a high boundary (e.g., near system limit) and max submission size to a large allowed value
4. Save the assignment
test_cases.expected_result: Form accepts boundary values if within system constraints; assignment created and file submission controls appear for students; if values exceed constraints an inline error prevents saving

test_cases.test_case: Save and display newly created assignment
preconditions: Assignment creation form filled with valid inputs including required fields
steps: 1. Click 'Save and display' on the assignment form
test_cases.expected_result: Assignment is created and the user is redirected to the newly created assignment's page showing metadata and description

test_cases.test_case: Update Course Settings and save
preconditions: User is on Course Settings form with permission to edit course
steps: 1. Change a required field such as Course full name or Course short name if present
2. Adjust Course visibility and start date if needed
3. Click 'Save and display'
test_cases.expected_result: Changes persist and user returns to course page; inline validation enforces required fields before save

test_cases.test_case: Enrol a user via Participants page
preconditions: User is on Participants page and has enrollment permission
steps: 1. Click 'Enrol users' button
2. In the enrol dialog search for a user
3. Select a Role from the Role dropdown and optionally set Enrollment duration
4. Confirm enrollment
test_cases.expected_result: User is added to the course with the selected role and appears in the participants list

test_cases.test_case: Apply participants filter that yields no results
preconditions: User is on Participants page
steps: 1. Use filter system to add conditions that match no enrolled users (e.g., uncommon attribute value)
2. Click 'Apply filters'
test_cases.expected_result: Participants table shows an empty state indicating no results; 'Clear filters' restores the full list

test_cases.test_case: Quick grading mode allows inline grade entry and save
preconditions: User is on Assignment Submissions view and has grading permission
There are student submission rows present
steps: 1. Enable 'Quick grading' mode
2. Enter numeric grades inline for several students
3. Click 'Save changes' or equivalent save action
test_cases.expected_result: Inline grades are persisted, grading status updates accordingly, and saved values appear in grade columns

test_cases.test_case: Gradebook prevents saving values outside configured grade range
preconditions: User is on Gradebook Grader report with Edit mode enabled
An activity column has a configured grade range
steps: 1. Edit a grade cell and enter a value outside the configured range (e.g., greater than max points)
2. Attempt to save changes
test_cases.expected_result: The out-of-range value is flagged inline and saving is blocked with an error until corrected

test_cases.test_case: Profile Edit prevents saving when required fields missing
preconditions: User is on Edit profile form
steps: 1. Clear a required field such as First name or Email address
2. Click 'Update profile'
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation prevents save; required fields are highlighted with an error; profile is not updated

test_cases.test_case: Logout terminates session and protected pages require re-authentication
preconditions: User is logged in
steps: 1. Click user's initials and select 'Log out' from the dropdown
2. After logout, attempt to navigate to a protected page (e.g., Dashboard or Course page)
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to the login page after logout; attempts to access protected pages redirect to login and require authentication
